journal_entry.reason: Record the advance of a short-term loan to a business partner. Cash is transferred out and a loan receivable asset is established for the principal amount. Interest revenue will be recognized in future periods as it is earned monthly.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Target is advancing a short-term loan to a business partner. This is an asset exchange transaction: cash (an asset) is converted into a loan receivable (another asset). The $2,000,000 principal is recorded as Short-term loans receivable (asset increase, debit) and the cash transferred from the chequing account is recorded as a decrease to Cash and cash equivalents (asset decrease, credit). The interest terms (4.5% annual, receivable monthly) will govern future monthly accrual entries, but at the time of the loan advance, no interest revenue has been earned yet, so no interest is recorded in this initial entry. The loan is classified as short-term because the term is one year.
